comment_body_excerpt:
**🟡 [MEDIUM] DiffPositionResolver.line_in_diff() is called after snap() even when replacement_line_count=1, adding a redundant diff parse for the common case.**
*Agents: Zara 🔒 **Security** | Kai ⚡ **Performance** → Nova 🌟 (synthesised)*

> 💡 **Recommendation:** Only call line_in_diff() when replace
